历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category (including Science) was approximately 8033 → 8013 → 7217 → 13801 → 19645. In 2023, the ranking significantly moved forward (7217), but in 2024, due to adjustments in the new Gaokao subject selection and low-score majors at Yantai Research Institute pulling down the school line, the ranking substantially moved backward to 13801. In 2025, it continued to move backward to 19645, with a cumulative backward shift of about 12428 positions over the past two years, indicating significantly intensified competition. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was approximately 89–90 from 2021 to 2023, 89 in 2024, and increased to 103 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 108, an increase of about 4.85% compared to 2025, with the slight expansion slightly intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class university; the Soft Science Chinese University main ranking has steadily risen from 30th in 2021 to 24th in 2026, reflecting enhanced comprehensive strength. In 2024, the reputation evaluation was clearly negative (admission score line plummeted by 500 positions, poor enrollment communication), but no negative signals for this school appeared in 2025 reputation data. Douyin heat total ranking 13th (high heat), with videos mainly about cafeteria food, Zhang Xuefeng recommendations, etc., showing high exposure. No obvious negative public opinion in 2026. Crop Science A+, Veterinary Medicine A+, Animal Science A+, Grass Science A+, Food Science and Engineering A+, Plant Protection A, Biology A, totaling 7 A- and above disciplines, with agricultural and forestry disciplines at the national top level, strongly attracting related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and other engineering majors continue to be highly recommended; the school's Computer Science, Electronic Information and other majors benefit from overall popularity. Agriculture, Food Science and other advantageous disciplines have stable social popularity. The total number of Gaokao examinees in the province in 2026 is about 451,000, slightly decreasing from about 462,000 in 2025; estimated Physics Category examinees about 313,000 (slightly down from 321,000 in 2025), easing competition pressure slightly. China Agricultural University is located in Beijing, with certain regional appeal to Anhui examinees. The school's enrollment plan in Anhui for Physics Category has increased from 90 in 2021 to 108 in 2026, showing a continuous expansion trend, with stable local enrollment proportion.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant backward trend in historical rankings over the past two years, the slight expansion of the 2026 plan (about 4.85%), a slight decrease in the total number of Physics Category examinees in the province, the continuous rise in the school's Soft Science ranking, and high Douyin heat exposure, based on the 2025 baseline of 19645, the expansion effect causes the ranking number to increase (competition intensifies), but the decrease in examinees and reputation improvement form a counterbalance. The predicted 2026 minimum ranking is about 20017, with a range of 19517–20517.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If the ranking is within the predicted range of 19517–20517, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Food Science and Engineering, Agronomy, Veterinary Medicine and other advantageous disciplines), with Tier 1 majors (Science Experimental Class, Computer Science) as a reach, and Tier 3 Yantai Research Institute majors as safety. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<19517), focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors. If the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>20517), it is recommended to mainly rely on Tier 3 safety options.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category (including Liberal Arts) was approximately 1162 → 1173 → 1255 → 2135 → 2198. Rankings were stable between 1162 and 1255 from 2021 to 2023. In 2024, due to adjustments in the new college entrance examination subject selection and low-scoring programs at Yantai Research Institute lowering the school's cutoff line, the ranking dropped significantly to 2135. In 2025, it remained roughly stable at 2198, with a cumulative decline of about 943 positions over the past two years. The provincial enrollment plan for History Category was about 13–14 students from 2021 to 2023, 18 in 2024, and 27 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 27 students, unchanged from 2025, indicating stable enrollment scale.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, and Double First-Class university. The Soft Science Chinese University Main Ranking has risen from 30th in 2021 to 24th in 2026, showing steady improvement in recent years. In 2024, the reputation evaluation was clearly negative (admission cutoff line plummeted by 500 positions), but in 2025, no negative signals for this university appeared in reputation data. Douyin popularity ranks 13th overall (high heat), with videos mainly about cafeteria food and recommendations by Zhang Xuefeng, resulting in relatively high exposure. The university's advantageous disciplines are mainly in agriculture and forestry (Crop Science A+, Veterinary Medicine A+, etc.), while liberal arts enrollment majors (Law, Communication, Business Administration, Sociology, etc.) have no directly corresponding A+ disciplines, making the liberal arts strength relatively average.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law major popularity is divided and wait-and-see, Business Administration is clearly discouraged, Journalism and Communication is clearly discouraged, and the overall popularity of liberal arts majors is relatively cold. In 2026, the total number of college entrance exam takers in the province is about 451,000, slightly down from about 462,000 in 2025. The estimated number of History Category students is about 138,000 (slightly down from 141,000 in 2025), easing competitive pressure slightly. China Agricultural University is located in Beijing, which has some regional appeal to Anhui liberal arts students. The History Category enrollment plan has increased from 13 students in 2021 to 27 in 2026, showing an expansion trend, with an increased proportion of local enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the significant decline in historical rankings over the past two years followed by stabilization, the 2026 enrollment plan unchanged from 2025, a slight decrease in the total number of History Category students in the province, and the overall cold popularity of liberal arts majors, based on the 2025 baseline of 2198, with a stable plan and slightly fewer students easing competition slightly, the predicted 2026 minimum ranking is approximately 2168, with a range of 1843–2493.
